title: error.rs WH_ERROR_MIN/MAX range excludes valid codes -2100..-2105
description: WH_ERROR_MAX = -2000 and WH_ERROR_MIN = -2302 span the entire enum but the doc comment says 'WH_ERROR_BADARGS' is the max. This is correct. However, if the wolfHSM C library adds new error codes outside this range in a future version, Error::check will route them to Error::Ffi instead of Error::Wh, changing the error type silently. This is a version-drift maintenance risk — the range bounds are not derived from the header at compile time.
